get.summary: Default operation to get a list of all available EnergyUsages
get.description: Default operation to get a list of all available EnergyUsages

202.description: Accepted. Returned for DELAYED requests. No payload.

head.description: Get HEAD info for EnergyUsages. Returns all HTTP Headers but no payload, otherwise it works like HTTP GET.

200.description: Operation succeeded. No payload returned for HTTP HEAD.

put.summary: Default operation to update or delete multiple EnergyUsage
put.description: Default operation to update or delete multiple EnergyUsage

202.description: Accepted. Returned for DELAYED requests. No payload.

post.summary: Default operation to create a single EnergyUsage
